prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年内蒙古理科（物理类）最低录取位次分别为约3339名→2490名→3129名→1714名→1373名，整体呈显著前移趋势，近3年累计前移约1756名；2025年基准 位次约1373名，为近年最高水平；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年44人、2022年44人、2023年66人、2024年73人、2025年72人；2026年计划大幅 缩减至53人，较2025年减少约26.4%，缩招幅度明显，理论上使竞争加剧、位次前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（威海）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，隶属哈 工大体系；软科中国大学排名中哈工大2026年位列第12名（Top20），学校层次极高，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆 情；抖音热度排名中哈工大（本部）位列第10（高热），短视频曝光量大，报考关注度较高；2024年曾出现投档线相关讨论但属中关注级别，未对整体声誉造成实质冲击；依托哈工大体系，拥有机械工程A+、控制科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、材料科学与工程A+、软件工程A等大量A类学科（A-及以上超10个），工科实力全国顶尖， 与招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业持续高热推荐，与该校工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班、机器人与智能装备等）方 向高度契合，热门专业吸引力强；内蒙古2026年高考总考生约15.4万人，物理类按历史比例估算约11.1万人，较2025年物理类8.37万人增加约32.5%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显 著加剧；该校位于山东威海，非内蒙古本省，但作为C9名校校区，跨省报考热度不减；2025年物理类招生72人，在内蒙古投放名额较多，本省考生认可度高。综合2026年招生计划大幅缩减（缩招26.4%，推动位次前移）与内蒙古物理类考生大幅增加（增幅约32.5%，推动位次后移）两大核心因素，缩招效应与考生增长效 应相互对冲，但考生增幅更大且学校层次与专业热度持续高位，预计2026年最低录取位次较；预测最低位次约1186名，区间1056–1316名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（机器人与智能装备拔尖班）
- 工科试验班（AI加先进技术领军班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 软件工程（卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智能制造卓越优才计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间1056–1316名内，建议以二档软件工程为主攻方向、一档拔尖班/领军班为冲刺目标、三档卓越优才计划为稳妥保底；位次明显优于区间下限（1056名以内）可重 点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Inner Mongolia Science (Physics Category) were approximately 3339 → 2490 → 3129 → 1714 → 1373, showing a significant upward trend overall, with a cumulative advance of about 1756 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 1373, the highest level in recent years; the enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia Science (Physics Category): 44 in 2021, 44 in 2022, 66 in 2023, 73 in 2024, 72 in 2025; the 2026 plan is sharply reduced to 53, a decrease of about 26.4% compared to 2025, a significant reduction in enrollment, theoretically intensifying competition and pushing rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Weihai) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, belonging to the HIT system; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, HIT ranked 12th in 2026 (Top 20), with an extremely high university level, continuously attracting high-scoring students; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion; in Douyin popularity rankings, HIT (main campus) ranked 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure and high application attention; in 2024, there were discussions related to admission cutoffs but at a medium attention level, without substantial impact on overall reputation; relying on the HIT system, it has a large number of A-level disciplines (A- and above over 10), including Mechanical Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Software Engineering A, etc., with top national engineering strength, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other majors continue to be highly recommended, highly aligned with the university's Engineering Experimental Classes (AI plus Advanced Technology Leading Class, Robotics and Intelligent Equipment, etc.), with strong appeal of popular majors; in 2026, the total number of examinees in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with Physics Category estimated at about 111,000 based on historical proportions, an increase of about 32.5% compared to 83,700 in 2025, a significant increase in examinee scale, sharply intensifying competition; the university is located in Weihai, Shandong, not in Inner Mongolia, but as a campus of a C9 prestigious university, cross-province application enthusiasm remains high; in 2025, Physics Category enrollment was 72, with a relatively large number of slots allocated in Inner Mongolia, and high recognition among local examinees. Combining the two core factors of a sharp reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (26.4% reduction, pushing rankings forward) and a significant increase in Inner Mongolia Physics Category examinees (about 32.5% increase, pushing rankings backward), the reduction effect and the examinee growth effect offset each other, but the examinee increase is larger and the university level and major popularity remain high, so the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to be; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1186, with a range of 1056–1316.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics and Intelligent Equipment Top Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (AI plus Advanced Technology Leading Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing Excellent Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1056–1316, it is recommended to target Tier 2 Software Engineering as the main direction, Tier 1 Top Class/Leading Class as a sprint goal, and Tier 3 Excellent Talent Program as a safe backup; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 1056), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors.
